projects.jlptLabSubtitle: A structured learning platform designed to help users practice and understand concepts through real exam-based questions.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.p1: This project was inspired by my personal experience preparing for the JLPT N2 exam.
overview.p2: I realized that memorizing concepts alone is not enough — applying them through real questions builds true understanding.
overview.p3: However, solving full-length exams repeatedly can be overwhelming and time-consuming.
overview.p4: This led me to build a more focused and practical learning platform.

coreIdea.title: Core Concept
coreIdea.p1: The platform breaks down real exam questions into small, manageable practice units.
coreIdea.p2: Each question includes explanations to help users understand both correct and incorrect answers, focusing on learning through understanding.

userFriendly.title: User-Focused Design
userFriendly.p1: Designed with simplicity in mind, the platform reduces stress and makes learning more comfortable.
userFriendly.p2: Users can practice at their own pace without feeling overwhelmed.

status.title: Current Status
status.p1: The project is currently in development.
status.p2: I'm focusing on improving UI/UX and building core features for a smooth user experience.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.p1: The goal is to help learners build confidence, reduce anxiety, and understand how real exam questions work.
